Welcome back to the gym legacy coaching course. So we will be going over action plans. What are action plans? So action plans are something that you will create short-term and long-term goals with your coaches based on the current needs of your gym. So they're plans that when you are finished executing these plans hopefully you no longer have that problem. So anytime you have a problem, anytime you want to optimize something you'll be creating an action plan with your coach and whether it's short or long term completely depends on what the problem is. So some short-term action plans can include knowing your numbers like KPIs maybe there is just a case of you not knowing all of your numbers that you need to know to be able to make decisions right. Profit levers so that could be maybe you're not charging enough for your memberships maybe your capacity you're having a hard time with your capacity so there's things like that that you could make very quick changes to that would have a huge impact on your gym and that maybe that's just something that your coach needs to go over with you. Bolt-on or member monetization so maybe you have a lot of active members but you're not reselling them on anything new or anything different and that's a huge missed opportunity. So if you are finding it that you're not having enough profit per month maybe implementing some member monetization or bolt-on sales will help you increase the profit to a point to that you're comfortable with ROI and life and legacy it could be if you're feeling exhausted if you're feeling like you you're just working yourself to the bone maybe this would be an action plan that we begin implementing for 30 days to really see the effects of it. Consuming portal content so there's a chance that you may just lack the knowledge that you need to be able to get to the next level but all of that information is already put together in the portal and it might just become finding a way to set aside the time to be able to consume all of that so you can get to the next level and then you know something simple like creating new ads so these are just some examples there is a ton of short-term action plans completely dependent on the type of problem that you're having at your gym or you might not even be having a problem but you just want to optimize a certain process that's why we're creating these shorter term action plans long-term action plans those are going to take longer than 30 days short-term action plans they should all be within 30 days right long-term they'll take a little bit longer than 30 days to implement and execute and see the results from so those could be things like the acquisition system that you're using how do you acquire new clients are you selling you know green play are you selling challenge are you having a hard time converting members over from the challenge to EFT there's a lot of moving pieces when it comes to acquisition and if you really want to increase your acquisition saying hey right now I'm at you know I I gained 30 new members per month and I want to bump that up to 60 totally doable but that's a longer term plan that we need to set up that typically isn't isn't able to be executed within 30 days fulfillment systems so if your fulfillment isn't very good at your gym and you want to you know fix your programming for your training you want to take a look at how your staff like communicates with the members and communication cycles and all that kind of stuff how you fulfill your services can absolutely be optimized or fixed and it just takes a little bit longer than 30 days to do that so we create a longer term action plan with more checkpoints along the way retention systems as you guys know there if you've been through the retention course in this portal we have the five horsemen of retention and each one of those plays a huge role but getting each one of those set up and running super smooth is going to take longer than in 30 days but will absolutely help you create that and execute that so maybe your attrition goes from 10% to 5% other things are leadership culture how to build your dream team graduating to the next class so if you have a goal of getting from 100 members to 300 members you're going to bounce a few classes along the way so we're going to create these long term action plans that help you do that and get you with the next level coach that has an expertise of you know 200 and 275 members and once you've gotten past that well guess what there's another coach where their expertise is 275 to 350 or however the structure goes so that those that kind of concludes the long term action plans but there's a ton more than what's just shown as an example here on a coaching call you and your coach will discuss the plan and what needs to happen by when so you guys will will totally talk about the entire game plan and and when you're gonna follow up and and and take a look at how well it went right so a coaching coordinator will then send you a copy of the action plan along with the resources to help you execute it so we have a ton of resources that we've compiled over the years and so your coach might reference them like hey we're gonna do this we're gonna do that well the coaching coordinator is gonna actually send that to you whether it's over email or text whatever your preferred communication is will probably email it to you but because that way you can have like documents and stuff but they'll give you the plan to execute then you have a follow-up call with your coach to discuss the results of the plan how it all went and if that's still an issue for you so all calls are scheduled by the coaching coordinators unless they schedule unless you schedule it with your coach directly otherwise the coaching coordinators are kind of managing the schedules of the coaches because they have more coaching clients more gym owners more gym lords than just you so there might already be somebody that has a call during that time so the coaching coordinators are gonna be running the schedules for them however if you schedule something directly with your coach that's totally fine you can always request a meeting with your coach on your weekly recap reports so you'll send a report every Friday or whatever day makes the most sense for you to report like how the week went basically and on there you can always request a meeting it says would you like to schedule a call with your coach to discuss goals and if you click yes you can pick a day of the week that works and the time of the week that works best for you and then we will schedule that for you and send you the zoom link so super simple that's how you do it but if it's like an emergency you can reach out to your coach directly now lots of time will be put into creating action plans along with helping you execute them so it's really important that you give a hundred percent like if you're gonna request a meeting with your coach and you guys gonna sit down and and and develop an action plan to to crush together and your coaching coordinators gonna help put it all together and send it to you like it's super important that you actually do it because we're gonna have a follow-up meeting to see how it went and if you are if you didn't do any of it like that's gonna be really tough for the coach to want to be a hundred and ten percent invested in you if you're not really invested in yourself so it's really important that you do it these are the best practices that will boost your profit and solve the problems while scaling your gym and that is exactly why everybody is here we want to scale we want to not have problems and we want to increase our profit so these plans are designed to do that don't just blow them off now that's all I'm gonna say about action plans they're absolutely really cool we've put a lot of different thought into the most common problems that gym owners have both short-term and long-term and what you'll be talking about with your coaches is like a culmination of all those best practices so hopefully you guys reach out and you see all of the value in here and now we can jump into the next part of the training
